dashboard.label: Ping Monitor Overview
dashboard.description: Enterprise network endpoint availability and latency monitoring with asset correlation

search.query: | inputlookup ping_monitor_settings_lookup | head 1 | eval pm_index=if(isnull(events_index) OR events_index=="", "ping", events_index) | eval pm_sourcetype=if(isnull(events_sourcetype) OR events_sourcetype=="", "ping_monitor", events_sourcetype) | eval pm_metrics_index=if(isnull(metrics_index) OR metrics_index=="", "ping_metrics", metrics_index)
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats count by group | fields group | sort group
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | search group=$group_filter$ hostname=$hostname_filter$ | stats dc(target_ip) as total_endpoints

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | search group=$group_filter$ hostname=$hostname_filter$ | stats sum(pings_successful) as success, sum(pings_sent) as total | eval availability=round((success/total)*100, 2) | fields availability

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary avg_latency_ms>0 | search group=$group_filter$ hostname=$hostname_filter$ | stats avg(avg_latency_ms) as avg_latency | eval avg_latency=round(avg_latency, 2)

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | search group=$group_filter$ hostname=$hostname_filter$ | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss by hostname | where packet_loss > 0 | stats count as hosts_with_issues
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | search group=$group_filter$ hostname=$hostname_filter$ | timechart span=5m avg(eval(100-packet_loss_pct)) as availability by group

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary avg_latency_ms>0 | search group=$group_filter$ hostname=$hostname_filter$ | timechart span=5m avg(avg_latency_ms) as avg_latency, max(max_latency_ms) as max_latency, min(min_latency_ms) as min_latency

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary avg_latency_ms>0 | search group=$group_filter$ hostname=$hostname_filter$ | stats avg(avg_latency_ms) as avg_latency, max(max_latency_ms) as max_latency, min(min_latency_ms) as min_latency by hostname | sort -avg_latency | head 20
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | search group=$group_filter$ hostname=$hostname_filter$ | timechart span=5m avg(packet_loss_pct) as avg_packet_loss by hostname

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | search group=$group_filter$ hostname=$hostname_filter$ | eval loss_bucket=case( packet_loss_pct==0, "0% (No Loss)", packet_loss_pct>0 AND packet_loss_pct<=25, "1-25%", packet_loss_pct>25 AND packet_loss_pct<=50, "26-50%", packet_loss_pct>50 AND packet_loss_pct<=75, "51-75%", packet_loss_pct>75 AND packet_loss_pct<100, "76-99%", packet_loss_pct==100, "100% (Total Loss)" ) | stats count by loss_bucket | sort loss_bucket

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | search group=$group_filter$ hostname=$hostname_filter$ | stats latest(_time) as last_check_epoch, latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, latest(avg_latency_ms) as avg_latency, latest(min_latency_ms) as min_latency, latest(max_latency_ms) as max_latency, latest(pings_successful) as last_success, latest(pings_sent) as last_sent, values(group) as group, values(description) as description, values(entitytype) as entitytype, values(device) as device, values(vendor) as vendor by hostname, target_ip | eval last_check=strftime(last_check_epoch, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval status=case( packet_loss==0, "Healthy", packet_loss>0 AND packet_loss<50, "Degraded", packet_loss>=50 AND packet_loss<100, "Critical", packet_loss==100, "Down" ) | eval status_icon=case( status=="Healthy", "✅", status=="Degraded", "⚠️", status=="Critical", "🔶", status=="Down", "❌" ) | eval display_status=status_icon." ".status | eval avg_latency=if(avg_latency>0, round(avg_latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | eval min_latency=if(min_latency>0, round(min_latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | eval max_latency=if(max_latency>0, round(max_latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | eval packet_loss=packet_loss."%" | table display_status, hostname, target_ip, group, entitytype, device, vendor, description, packet_loss, avg_latency, min_latency, max_latency, last_check | rename display_status as Status | sort status

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | search group=$group_filter$ hostname=$hostname_filter$ | stats sum(pings_successful) as success, sum(pings_sent) as total by group | eval availability=round((success/total)*100, 2) | fields group, availability | sort -availability
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | search group=$group_filter$ hostname=$hostname_filter$ | stats dc(hostname) as host_count by group | sort -host_count

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=ping | search group=$group_filter$ hostname=$hostname_filter$ | eval status_icon=if(status=="success", "✅", "❌") | eval latency_display=if(latency_ms>0, latency_ms." ms", "N/A") | table timestamp, status_icon, hostname, target_ip, group, latency_display, ttl, error_message | rename status_icon as Status, latency_display as Latency, error_message as "Error Message" | sort -timestamp | head 100
